title: Blockbuster debut! Vijay Tamil Nadu's Gen-nayagan
content: Tamil Nadu's political landscape is witnessing the rise of a new superstar in actor Vijay, mirroring MGR's trajectory. Despite a contrasting on-screen persona, Vijay's unconventional campaign, leveraging social media and a direct voter appeal, has positioned him as a formidable force. He has emerged from the shadows of established parties, capturing public imagination and potentially reshaping the state's political future.

title: IPL 2026: Why the mighty Mumbai Indians are in desperate need of an overhaul
content: Wholesome changes are needed at the Mumbai Indians after yet another underwhelming IPL season. It's high time the management makes the tough calls on players whose personal interests and ambition do not contribute to the team's cause. The next mega auction is an opportunity for the franchise to fix the mistakes made at the auction table, but the immediate need is to set the house in order and restore normalcy in the dressing room.

title: 'Anga, Banga, Kalinga': BJP completes eastern arc with Bengal victory
content: The BJP has achieved a significant milestone by securing a victory in West Bengal in 2026, completing its symbolic arc across eastern India with control in Bihar, Bengal, and Odisha. This win consolidates a long-standing political project, marking a sharp turnaround for the party after a Lok Sabha setback and expanding its national reach.

title: After OpenAI raised over $4bn; Anthropic announces partnership with Blackstone & others
content: AI giants OpenAI and Anthropic are intensifying their competition by launching new ventures aimed at boosting enterprise AI adoption. Both companies have secured significant funding from major financial institutions to help businesses integrate their AI tools into daily operations. This strategic move prioritizes real-world usage and revenue growth as both firms reportedly explore public listings.

title: Highly qualified, not dependent: HC denies maintenance to wife with Rs 31 lakh income
content: The dispute arose from matrimonial proceedings between two highly qualified medical professionals. The wife, a practicing gynaecologist with an M.D. degree, challenged a trial court order which had partly rejected her application for maintenance under Sections 24 and 26 of the Hindu Marriage Act, 1955.

title: JP Morgan CEO wants companies to get rid of some managers; here’s why
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon identified bureaucracy as a 'silent killer' that breeds complacency and inefficiency within organizations. He urged companies to eliminate managers who foster such practices, emphasizing the need to focus on outcomes and share information transparently. Dimon advocates for assigning critical tasks to small, focused teams to increase accountability and speed up decision-making.

title: ‘You’re one of the OGs’: Virat Kohli’s heartfelt tribute for RCB stalwart - Watch
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru bid an emotional farewell to former head physio Evan Speechly after his 18-year association with the franchise.  Virat Kohli and Director of Cricket Mo Bobat led tributes, highlighting Speechly's professionalism, kindness, and dedication. Speechly expressed his gratitude, calling RCB family and feeling fortunate for his long tenure.

title: West Bengal election: The 'sun sets' for Mamata Banerjee
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party has achieved a historic victory in West Bengal, securing a landslide win and ending Mamata Banerjee's 15-year reign. The BJP claimed every seat in nine districts, including Purba Medinipur and the northern hills, signaling a significant shift in the state's political landscape. This triumph marks the BJP's first time in power in West Bengal.

title: American billionaire has a ‘message’ for Sam Altman: Wasting a lot of money
content: Billionaire Mark Cuban has raised concerns about OpenAI's business strategy. He believes the company is spending too much on infrastructure. Cuban suggests that rapidly advancing technology will make current investments unsustainable. He also doubts the long-term profitability of large AI models like ChatGPT. Internal tensions at OpenAI reportedly exist regarding cost control.

title: Lest you forget: The promises made by TVK that helped it claim victory
content: Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam's manifesto, spanning 94 pages, outlines comprehensive promises for Tamil Nadu voters. Key pledges include monthly financial aid for women, free bus rides, and healthcare initiatives. The party also committed to youth development, farmer support, police reforms, and economic revival for MSMEs and weavers.

title: IPL: Will Lungi Ngidi play vs CSK today? Munaf Patel gives major fitness update
content: Delhi Capitals bowler Lungi Ngidi is fit for the IPL 2026 match against Chennai Super Kings. Bowling coach Munaf Patel confirmed Ngidi's availability. Delhi Capitals need to win this crucial game to stay in playoff contention. Early wickets are vital against Chennai Super Kings. The team is likely to maintain selection continuity.

title: Commanders, Raiders eye former cowboys CB Trevon Diggs in free agency rumors
content: The Washington Commanders and the Las Vegas Raiders are exploring a move for Trevon Diggs as teams reassess needs after the NFL Draft. The former Dallas Cowboys All-Pro remains a free agent following an inconsistent 2025 season. With strong ties to Dan Quinn, Washington could offer the right system for a comeback. Meanwhile, the Raiders need depth in the secondary. Diggs’ ball-hawking ability still stands out despite injuries and recent struggles, making him a low-risk option with upside as training camp approaches

title: Viral clip: IShowSpeed lands punch on fan during appearance in Puerto Rico
content: Popular streamer IShowSpeed's recent public appearance in Puerto Rico took a dramatic turn when a playful boxing-style moment with a fan went viral.  During a meet-up, Speed landed a strong punch, causing the fan to stumble, which quickly ignited online discussions and exaggerated claims of a knockout. This incident highlights the unpredictable nature of his content tours.

title: Candace Owens claims Ben Shapiro lawsuits; Laura Loomer fires back with criticism
content: Candace Owens and Laura Loomer are in a heated public dispute, with Owens accusing Ben Shapiro of legal attacks and Loomer challenging her claims. The conflict includes allegations about lawsuits, private data access, and media influence. Other figures like Ana Kasparian are also involved. Many claims remain unverified, making the situation complex and still developing.

title: Over $30/barrel discount: Iraq cuts crude prices, but buyers beware!
content: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has been severely disrupted since the conflict escalated toward the end of February, and renewed clashes between the US and Iran on Monday have raised fresh concerns.

title: Mamata 'Bye'-nerjee: BJP tide leaves Bengal's big fish out of water
content: Bengal has witnessed a seismic political shift as the BJP surged to power, unseating Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress after 15 years. The saffron party secured a decisive victory, breaching the majority mark and fulfilling Amit Shah's ambitious target. This marks a significant change in the state's political landscape, ending decades of Left and TMC dominance.

title: 'I am their next target': Raghav Chadha alleges 'vendetta politics' by Punjab govt
content: Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha accused the AAP-led Punjab government of using state machinery for political vendetta against MPs who joined the BJP. He alleged selective targeting through various agencies, presenting these concerns to the President. Another rebel MP, Sandeep Pathak, stated they sought constitutional safeguards from the President, who assured protection.

title: IPL: What’s gone wrong for LSG? Pant’s form, captaincy, batting woes derail campaign
content: Lucknow Super Giants face a dire IPL 2026 season, reeling from six consecutive losses and languishing at the bottom. Captain Rishabh Pant's form and leadership are under scrutiny, while batting collapses and inconsistent bowling plague the team. With playoff hopes fading, LSG desperately needs an extraordinary turnaround to salvage their campaign.

title: Anand Mahindra shares images of Thar-based Military ATV, gets stunning mods
content: Mahindra Group has unveiled a rugged new all-terrain vehicle (ATV) for defence forces, built on the Thar Roxx platform. This mission-ready machine boasts a stripped-down, open design with a tubular roll cage, heavy-duty bumper, and modular storage. Airdrop-ready, it promises resilience and adaptability for any terrain, reflecting Mahindra's core philosophy.

title: India among most resilient large EMs, better placed for future global shocks: Moody’s
content: In its latest study on emerging-market sovereigns, the agency notes that India has ranked among the more resilient economies since 2020, based on multiple indicators such as sovereign bond spreads, domestic yield movements, and exchange-rate stability.

title: 'I was never rated as a T20 player': KL Rahul's candid admission
content: KL Rahul is enjoying a stellar IPL 2026 season, leading Delhi Capitals in runs with 433 in 9 matches. He reflects on overcoming the 'Test specialist' tag to become an all-format player, emphasizing his pride in adapting to T20 demands, particularly maximising the Powerplay for his team.

title: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw picks niece Claire Mazumdar as successor at Biocon: Report
content: Claire Mazumdar, 37 years of age, currently heads Bicara Therapeutics as its founder and CEO. The firm, which was incubated by Biocon and later listed on NASDAQ, went public in 2024 and now has a market valuation of over $1.6 billion.

title: Indian esports scales up, but still awaits its 1983 Cricket World Cup moment
content: India’s esports ecosystem is scaling rapidly, backed by global exposure and new regulation, but still lacks a defining breakthrough. Animesh Agarwal outlines the gaps - structure, perception, and global success - even as S8UL expands internationally. For India, the shift from potential to proof hinges on a global win that can transform esports into a mainstream sporting narrative.

title: 'No proposal before the govt': Centre rules out relief for state oil firms
content: State-run fuel retailers will not receive government financial backing for losses incurred from selling petrol, diesel, and aviation turbine fuel below cost. Despite rising crude oil prices, the government has opted to shield consumers by not revising retail prices for these fuels, focusing instead on price adjustments for bulk diesel and commercial LPG.

title: Indian firms go big in America: Pour in $16.4 bn, create over 70,000 jobs across US
content: Indian companies are significantly boosting the US economy with substantial investments, creating thousands of jobs, and driving innovation.  Senior officials highlighted nearly $16.4 billion in cumulative FDI, supporting over 70,000 jobs and significant R&D.  Further commitments are anticipated, underscoring India's growing role in key American sectors.

title: ‘95 off 30 balls!’: Langer cites practice blitz to back ‘selfless’ Pant despite LSG defeat
content: Despite another loss in IPL 2026, Lucknow Super Giants coach Justin Langer backed captain Rishabh Pant, highlighting a recent practice innings of 95 off 30 balls as proof he's close to his best. Langer defended Pant's decision to bat lower in the order, calling it a selfless move for the team's benefit.

title: Who will be West Bengal CM? Suvendu Adhikari, Dilip Ghosh top contenders
content: The BJP has secured a decisive victory in West Bengal, ending the Trinamool Congress's 15-year reign with a two-thirds majority. Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee's defeat marks a significant political shift. The party is now poised to form the government, with the selection of the next chief minister being the immediate focus.

title: Bookie allegedly shot dead by Khalistani shooters in Canada; gang links under probe
content: A man, identified by the alias Sam Canada and known as a bookie, was fatally shot in a Surrey office building, believed to be a targeted execution. Authorities are investigating potential links to pro-Khalistan shooters with Indian connections. A fugitive gangster claimed responsibility, alleging the victim was involved in match-fixing and betting, warning of further actions.

title: Hardik Pandya update: Ryan Rickelton shares latest on MI skipper’s illness
content: Mumbai Indians secured a vital IPL 2026 victory, yet captain Hardik Pandya's absence due to back spasms casts a shadow. Opener Ryan Rickelton expressed uncertainty about Pandya's return, admitting he's unaware of the issue's severity. Suryakumar Yadav captained in Pandya's stead as MI chased down a massive target, keeping playoff hopes alive.

title: Gold price prediction: Where are prices headed today - Check outlook for today
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are expected to continue seeing volatility in the near-term, says Praveen Singh, Head Currencies and Commodities, Mirae Asset ShareKhan.

title: Left out: Kerala gone, Communists not in office in any state after almost 50 years
content: Kerala's voters have ousted the CPM-led LDF, marking the first time since 1977 India has no Communist-governed state. The Congress-led UDF's victory, fueled by anti-incumbency, signals a significant challenge for the Left's national relevance and may impact the INDIA bloc's dynamics.  Defeat was compounded by the win of CPM rebels.

title: A star is born in Tamil Nadu politics: Quiet, introverted, persistent
content: Vijay's transformation from a shy child star to a perseverant cinematic icon is not just a tale of talent, but a narrative of determination that now propels him towards a political career. His formative years, filled with challenges and triumphs exemplified by the hit 'Poove Unakkaga,' reveal a spirit that refuses to wane.

title: 'Do not tell me again ... not acceptable': Gavaskar blasts Bumrah over no-ball errors
content: Jasprit Bumrah is experiencing a difficult IPL 2026 season, having taken only three wickets in ten matches, contributing to Mumbai Indians' struggles. Despite a recent win, Bumrah's performance against Lucknow Super Giants, including multiple no-balls, drew criticism from Sunil Gavaskar. Rohit Sharma and Ryan Rickelton's partnership secured Mumbai's victory.

title: Karunanidhi Cuts Ribbon, Young Vijay Stands Behind In Throwback Pic
content: Vijay has steered his fledgling new party, the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam, to a massive mandate in the Tamil Nadu assembly elections

title: Austrian Watchdog Files Complaint Against LinkedIn Over Paid Profile Views
content: A data protection group on Tuesday filed a complaint in Austria against professional networking platform LinkedIn, accusing it of charging users to see who has viewed their profiles.

title: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: "Stop Holding World Hostage," Germany Tells Iran After UAE Attacked
content: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.

title: Savings Over Stocks: How Vijay's Investments Defy His On-Screen Persona
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Election Results: Vijay reported Rs 213.36 crore parked in a single savings account at Indian Overseas Bank.

title: Watch: After TVK's Win, Vijay Celebrates At Home With Parents
content: Vijay, who won from both Perambur and Trichy East constituencies, marked the victory in a simple and heartfelt way.

title: Opinion: Opinion | MK Stalin: The Strongman Who Dismissed Voters As 'Fools' - And Paid For It
content: When did it begin to look like Stalin was growing unsure about victory? When he went out of his way to include more than 20 parties in his alliance.

title: Left Behind? Left Not In Power In Any State For 1st Time In 50 Years
content: When the first elections were held in the country in 1951-52, it was the Communist Party of India that had the highest number of seats among Opposition parties in the Lok Sabha.

title: Suvendu Adhikari Is BJP's Indisputable Hero In Mamata Banerjee's Bengal
content: Rarely does one thunder inside a veteran leader's fortress and get such a roaring success. But then there's Suvendu Adhikari.

title: No Insurance, No Clearance: 3 Lapses Surrounding Jabalpur Cruise Boat Tragedy
content: Minister of State for Tourism and Culture Dharmendra Bhav Singh Lodhi has admitted that the investigation has shown indications of negligence.

title: Swastikas Spray Painted On New York's Jewish Homes, Synagogues: Police
content: A police spokeswoman confirmed that "multiple locations had swastikas drawn with spray paint" and that no arrests had been made.

title: US Flying Gas Station Goes Missing Over Qatar, Called 'Emergency' Moments Ago
content: The flight tracking data show the plane flew in a circular pattern in the air for a while, before it begun its descent for landing.

title: Bengal Rejects 63% Of Mamata Banerjee's Cabinet, Anti-Incumbency In Focus
content: Ministers handling critical portfolios such as women and child development, industry, housing, power, education, transport and backward classes have all been turned away.

title: BJP Names Amit Shah, JP Nadda As Central Observers For Bengal, Assam
content: Haryana Chief Minister Nayab Singh Saini was made co-observer for election of BJP's legislative party leader in Assam, according to a notification issued by the party.

title: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: Vijay To Resign From Trichy East, MK Stalin's Resignation Accepted
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: While most exit polls have predicted DMK's second straight win, one suggested a huge wave of the "Vijay effect" in the state this time.

title: Vijay To Form An Alliance In Tamil Nadu? What TVK Insiders Told NDTV
content: Party insiders told NDTV that the TVK is counting on backing from key DMK allies, including the Congress which bagged five seats.

title: BJP 'hijacked' democracy, Punjab will stop their 'vijay rath': Kejriwal
content: “Today, democracy is threatened. In 2014, there was a wave in favour of Narendra Modi, and they kept winning elections. In February 2015, they won only three seats in Delhi. If they come to power in Punjab, they will ravage the State," says Mr. Kejriwal

title: ACB traps Banaganapalle MRO, surveyor for taking ₹50,000 bribe in Nandyala
content: Banaganapalle Tahsildar Ramireddy Rajeev Reddy and surveyor S.K. Hussain Basha caught accepting the second instalment of a ₹1 lakh bribe demanded for regularising land

title: Assembly election 2026 results LIVE: 'No question of me resigning; we were defeated by conspiracy', says Mamata Banerjee
content: Amit Shah named central observer for West Bengal, Nadda for Assam; M.K. Stalin steps down as Tamil Nadu CM

title: USA’s National Reconnaissance Office awards contract to Bengaluru space startup Pixxel to provide hyperspectral imagery
content: Pixxel said that the award supports the US government’s effort to evaluate and integrate emerging commercial hyperspectral data sources into the agency’s expanding remote sensing architecture.

title: Anantapur police bust international cricket betting racket run from Philippines; 10 arrested
content: ₹19.70 lakh in cash seized, ₹18.20 lakh in 49 bank accounts across nine banks frozen; gang routed money to a Philippines-based kingpin via mule accounts and SIM cards hidden in cargo jeans parcels, says Superintendent of Police P. Jagadeesh

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Payyannur verdict endorses internal criticism, signals shift in CPI(M) stronghold, says V Kunhikrishnan
content: The dissident leader of the Communist Party of India (Marxist) [CPI(M)] who won the Payyannur Assembly segment attributed his victory partly to substantial support from CPI(M) workers

title: R-5 zone withdrawn; CRDA panel reviews Amaravati village rehabilitation, land pooling
content: Three-member committee of Union Minister Pemmasani Chandra Sekhar, Minister P. Narayana and Tadikonda MLA Tenali Sravan Kumar reviews ‘grama kanthas’ and land pooling progress; CRDA Commissioner asked to visit 29 villages

title: Tamil Nadu election results 2026: Full list of winners
content: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), led by actor Joseph C. Vijay, has emerged as the single largest party in the 2026 Assembly elections.

title: Bombay HC frees 50 stranded seafarers; raps vessel owners for treating crew worse than pets
content: The Bombay High Court pulled up the vessel owners, accusing them of being the least interested in human lives and only being concerned about their vessels and commercial activities

title: Fadnavis orders drafting of strict law to restrict parole for sex offenders
content: “About 80 to 90% of the accused in such (sexual offence) cases are those arrested earlier for similar crimes and released on parole, during which they end up committing offences again,” sources quoting Mr. Fadnavis said

title: Odisha CM on 3-day business trip to Gujarat, aims for big investments
content: The tour will focus on textiles, chemicals and petrochemicals, metals & downstream industries, and pharmaceuticals

title: The BJP wins big in West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026: Results at a glance
content: After winning 206 (of 294) Assembly seats in West Bengal, the BJP is set to form a government in the State for the first time. Here are the results, with supporting graphics, at a glance

title: Sringeri recount: CM Siddaramaiah alleges criminal conspiracy by BJP, terms it ‘vote dacoity’
content: Mr. Siddaramaiah accused the then Basavaraj Bommai-led BJP government of being complicit with lower-level government personnel, who “tampered” with the postal ballot papers after counting.

title: Gangamma Jatara begins in Tirupati; ‘Pushpa’ film fuels return of cross-dressing ritual
content: Nine-day folk festival begins at the seven Gangamma temples; cross-dressing tradition by male devotees on the penultimate day, popularised in recent years by the film ‘Pushpa: The Rule’, sees a rousing reception from the younger generation

title: ITP Aero breaks ground for new ₹453-crore facility in Shamshabad
content: The commercial aviation engine components manufacturing plant will be fully operational in 2027, create over 350 skilled jobs in next five years

title: West Bengal election results: Full list of winners
content: The elections were held under the shadow of the SIR exercise, in which the names of around 91 lakh people were removed from the electoral rolls, which shrank to around 6.82 crore.

title: People of Tamil Nadu have endorsed coalition government: VCK’s Thirumavalavan
content: "The people have endorsed coalition government in 2026, ten years after VCK had promised it during 2016 Assembly elections (when it was a part of Makkal Nala Kootani)," he said.

title: Raging speculation about Congress’ CM-designate consumes the party in Kerala
content: A.K. Antony signalled that the names of Mr. Venugopal, Leader of the Opposition, V D Satheesan, and senior leader Ramesh Chennithala were in play for the Congress Chief Minister’s post

title: TVK captures all five constituencies in south Chennai
content: At Saidapet, TVK candidate M. Arul Prakasam defeated DMK’s Ma. Subramanian by a margin of 28,514 votes

title: Sukesh's wife denied bail in ₹200 crore extortion case, gets relief in ED case
content: The Delhi Police has booked Sukesh Chandrasekhar for allegedly duping the wives of former promoters of Ranbaxy

title: TCS hires 262 students of R.V.R. & J.C. College of Engineering, Guntur, in campus drive
content: Salary packages range from ₹3.5 lakh to ₹9 lakh a year; 1,054 students placed across various campus drives during the 2025-26 academic year

title: Delhi liquor case: Will appoint senior counsel to represent Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia in excise case, says Delhi HC
content: Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma deferred the hearing on the CBI’s petition challenging the trial court decision till May 8, observing that it would be appropriate to proceed with the matter once someone is appointed to represent them

title: Andhra Pradesh begins Godavari Pushkaralu 2027 preparations 18 months in advance
content: Tourism Minister Kandula Durgesh says nearly 10 crore devotees expected for the festival; Pushkar funds to also support permanent infrastructure in municipalities, Tourism Department to set up tent cities and promote homestays

title: Chemicals giant BASF’s Global Service Hub, Global Digital Hub in Hyderabad soon
content: BASF joins a league of extraordinary global peers that have chosen Hyderabad as a strategic base for their most critical operations: Telangana IT and Industries Minister Sridhar Babu

title: Collector urges officials to promote online yoga classes
content: The officials were explained the need for widespread publicity for the 100-day free online yoga classes which are jointly organized by the Union AYUSH Ministry and the Morarji Desai National Institute of Yoga

title: Scuba team unfurls mega national flag beneath deep sea, enters into Guinness World Records
content: Bengaluru-based adventure sports professional Sharath R. Ashok played an active role in this feat that saw the participation of about 200 professional scuba divers.

title: DMK’s vote share of 1.54 crore shows people’s faith, says M.K. Stalin
content: Mr. Stalin said it was the duty of the DMK to meet voters and thank them personally, and he called upon party candidates to do so

title: Allahabad High Court convicts two men in 1984 murder case, overturns acquittal after 42 years
content: A Division Bench of Justices Rajneesh Kumar and Babita Rani on May 4, allowed the State Government's appeal and held the accused guilty of culpable homicide not amounting to murder under Section 304 of the IPC

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: AIADMK loses impregnable fortress in Coimbatore district, reduced to one seat
content: The debacle has unsettled the party as it could retain only one seat, won by veteran S.P. Velumani in Thondamuthur constituency. Six of its incumbent MLAs were defeated.

title: Raghav Chadha meets President Murmu, alleges harassment of MPs who quit AAP and joined BJP
content: Raghav Chadha alleged that several former AAP MPs who have joined the BJP are facing intimidation and coercive actions from State agencies.

title: BJP State chief P.V.N. Madhav asks party cadre to stay among public, work for welfare
content: State BJP president addresses victory celebrations at Srikalahasti over party’s performance in West Bengal and Assam; says party will not tolerate sacrilege in temples, refers to Tirumala ghee adulteration issue

title: Amit Shah named central observer for West Bengal, Nadda for Assam
content: According to the notification, Haryana CM Nayab Singh Saini and Odisha Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi have been appointed as co-observers for Assam and West Bengal respectively

title: India, Jamaica agree to boost trade, skilled mobility: Jaishankar
content: India recognised Jamaica’s growing role as a logistics hub and gateway to the Caribbean for trade and investment, Mr. Jaishankar said.

title: CPI says party will take decision if Vijay seeks support to form government in Tamil Nadu
content: “We have not received any request so far. If he approaches us, we will consider it, as in a democracy we must respect every political party,” party State secretary M. Veerapandian said

title: Three-day annual conference of physicians KAPICON 2026 to begin in Shivamogga on May 8
content: Hundreds of physicians are expected to take part in the conference that includes presentations, discussions and hands-on workshops

title: Vijay holds key meeting as TVK eyes government formation in Tamil Nadu
content: Effectively, the party has 107 MLAs as TVK president C. Joseph Vijay has won from both Perambur in Chennai and Tiruchi East.

title: Sabarimala women entry case: Were you the ‘Chief Minister’; what was your ‘business’, Supreme Court asks lawyers’ body
content: The Association was the original writ petitioner which challenged the prohibition on entry of women aged between 10 years and 50 years into the Kerala temple

title: Shivamogga Institute of Medical Sciences seeks increase in intake of PG and UG courses
content: The institute currently offers 102 post-graduate seats across 22 departments while the under-graduate intake is 150

title: Six arrested for drug peddling in Bengaluru; narcotics worth ₹20 crore seized
content: Police seized 8 kg 58 grams of MDMA and 5 kg 700 grams of hydro ganja from their possession, along with four mobile phones used for communication, and a car used by them

title: M.K. Stalin resigns as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister; Governor accepts his resignation
content: “The Governor has requested him [Mr. Stalin] to continue in office until alternate arrangements are made,” a statement from the Lok Bhavan said.

title: Malayalam actor Santhosh Nair dies in road accident
content: Having acted in over a hundred films as well as television serials since the early 1980s, Santhosh was a familiar face to the Malayalam audience

title: South Coast Railway zone notified after a decade; HQ at Visakhapatnam, to start operations from June 1
content: India’s 18th railway zone, headquartered at Visakhapatnam, to be carved out of the existing East Coast Railway and South Central Railway from June 1, 2026; will integrate Guntakal, Guntur, Vijayawada and the new Visakhapatnam division

title: Prioritise energy security for keeping growth momentum going: RBI MPC member
content: “The Indian approach needs to focus both on stepping up oil exploration domestically and hastening the transition to alternative sources”, says Nagesh Kumar, director of the Institute for Studies in Industrial Development

title: Southern Railway’s traction distribution assets register best-ever performance in 2025-26; minimal disruption on electrified routes
content: During the year, the zone records just 3 asset failures as against 13 failures in 2024-25 translating into marking a 77% improvement

title: Governance is the ultimate currency in Kerala
content: The LDF’s unprecedented decade long-run has come to an end with the UDF winning the mandate by offering change and speaking to concrete grievances

title: Assam’s mandate of assertion and polarisation
content: The BJP’s strategy of conflating Hindu and Assamese identities, along with promoting welfare and development schemes, has led to its decisive victory in the State

title: Three more dogs rescued on Hyderabad outskirts; adoption requests pour in for abandoned Siberian huskies
content: Blood tests show some parameters are irregular, likely due to dehydration. Police register Cruelty case. Search for more dogs continue.

title: POLYCET 2026: 91.37% pass in Andhra Pradesh; girls outdo boys, ASR district tops list
content: A total of 1,48,950 candidates qualify for diploma admissions; girls record 93.57% pass rate against 89.88% for boys; over 84,000 seats on offer across 265 polytechnic institutions for 2026-27

title: Assam poll verdict rejection of blue blood politics: Himanta Biswa Sarma
content: The Chief Minister says that the sons of the State’s three former Chief Ministers are yet to create an identity independent of their fathers

title: TVK changes Tamil Nadu’s political landscape | Data
content: Actor C. Joseph Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam has, in its electoral debut, decimated the DMK’s seat base in the urban heartlands where the ruling party had been strongest. The AIADMK held its ground in the west and north through coalition cohesion, and the DMK clung on best in its delta heartland.

title: Three from ‘Lottery King’ Santiago Martin’s family win for different parties in Tamil Nadu, Puducherry
content: Santiago Martin, often referred to as ‘Lottery King’ and founder of Martin Group, now has three MLA-elects in his family

title: DMK’s outgoing MLA Paranthaman demands action against Sekarbabu for Stalin’s defeat in Kolathur
content: In a social media message, I. Paranthaman asked, “How could a person responsible for the defeat of our leader stand before him without any shame, fear, or embarrassment?”

title: West Bengal: Amit Shah's 'bye Didi' & 'Anga, Banga, Kalinga' prophecies come true
content: Counting will begin in the morning of may 4 . ballot box will open at 8 am, first round will be over at 9 and second round at 10 . BJP dismantled CM Mamata Banerjee's stronghold for 15 years .

title: West Bengal verdict: Why Mamata tasted defeat when she put fish on plate?
content: Mamata Banerjee framed the contest as a battle for Bengali identity against a hostile central govt . she drew attention to migrant workers being targeted in other states . BJP's alleged dictates on non-veg food and the Centre’s apathy in releasing funds .

title: Welfare vs welfare: How BJP trumped Mamata’s ‘pro-woman’ appeal
content: saffron party embraced cash transfer schemes and outbid the BJP . if the TMC offered Rs 1,500 per month to general category women under its flagship Lakshmir Bhandar scheme, it promised Rs 3,000 . it also pledged 3,000 monthly assistance to unemployed youth and Rs 9,000 support for farmers .
